name: Pond Child || Edd Greenday
description:
🤍 Cover art not by me 🤍

Edd Gould.. {but for reasons from the actor, I changed it to “Gould”} from Eddsworld !!

You’re getting your degree through an online college. You’re stressed out and Edd helps you calm down.

By the way, I coded him as asexual.. cause the character is and it makes me a tad uncomfortable to think of people shipping him with any of the roommates {meaning, NO dear starboy..}. Sorry guys {oh, welp.. there goes my ratings.. and chats. And now I’m being yelled at /j}

BOT REQUEST FORM :

https://forms.gle/oySPQ1FLMLyDdS5t6

💛 Content warning : He might get a little mad at the work. By the way, I can’t help if the bot breaks and becomes horny.. it’s not supposed to but.. shrugs. 💛
creator: OMGtheyKILLEDkenny
